name: Minty Salmon Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the canned salmon and break it into large flakes. Set aside.
2. Remove the avocado stones. Slice lengthwise from the rounded end. Do not slice completely through the narrow end. Slice each half into 5 pieces, placing them on a serving plate and spreading the slices out fan-like.
3. Brush the avocado slices with lime juice.
4. Arrange the endive on the plates. Place the salmon flakes on top of the endive. Mix together the cucumber, mint, and yogurt. Pour the mixture over the salad.
5. Serve immediately.
Serves 4. Approx. 300 kcals per serving
